summary: Automated follow-up issue creation added for actionable control-plane and artifact-contract failures. Unit tests added and README updated. A potential deduplication search-query bug must be fixed before merge.

requirement_checks.requirement: Actionable failure opens a follow-up issue
evidence: tests/failure-followup.test.mjs: unit test asserts createIssue flow via findOpenFollowup + createIssue paths
tests/handle-stage-failure.test.mjs: asserts that actionable failures result in comment augmentation and createIssue called in the handler
CI workflow run 23263316270: unit tests passed (unit: success)

requirement_checks.requirement: Duplicate signature suppresses new issue creation
evidence: tests/failure-followup.test.mjs: findOpenFollowup unit test returns matching issue when searchIssues returns items containing the signature
scripts/lib/failure-followup.mjs: findOpenFollowup uses searchIssues and inspects issue bodies for the signature marker
tests/failure-followup.test.mjs: classifyFollowup returns actionable=false for transient_infra

requirement_checks.requirement: Generated issue body matches template and evidence requirements
evidence: tests/failure-followup.test.mjs: buildFollowupIssue snapshot assertions for headings and metadata block
scripts/lib/failure-followup.mjs: buildFollowupIssue composes Problem statement and Evidence sections and appends factory-followup-meta

requirement_checks.requirement: Extend GitHub client with createIssue and searchIssues
evidence: scripts/lib/github.mjs: exports createIssue and searchIssues functions
tests/github.test.mjs: tests for createIssue and searchIssues behavior

requirement_checks.requirement: Refactor handle-stage-failure to wire follow-up creation and deduplication
evidence: scripts/handle-stage-failure.mjs: imports followup helpers, builds signature, calls findOpenFollowup and createIssue, appends follow-up comment section
tests/handle-stage-failure.test.mjs: exercises flows with mocked dependencies

requirement_checks.requirement: Add unit tests for follow-up classification and signature stability
evidence: tests/failure-followup.test.mjs: classification and signature stability tests present and passing
local test run: node --test output shows all three test suites passing
README.md: 'Actionable control-plane or artifact-contract failures now trigger an automatic Factory Request issue' section present
.factory/runs/52/acceptance-tests.md: includes acceptance test to verify README updates

findings.title: Deduplication search query appears malformed and may fail to match open follow-ups
findings.details: The search query constructed in scripts/lib/failure-followup.mjs uses a partial, unterminated quoted string and may not match the intended metadata block in issues. This can cause duplicate follow-up issues to be created for the same signature.
findings.recommendation: Fix the search query generation to include a robust match for the metadata block or search for the raw signature token. Add unit tests asserting the exact query string passed to searchIssues and an integration test covering dedupe behavior.

findings.title: Consider adding an explicit label to follow-up issues
findings.details: Adding a label like 'Factory Request' to created issues would make filtering and operator workflows easier. The current createIssue call supports labels but no labels are passed.
findings.recommendation: Include a configurable labels array when calling createIssue; update tests to assert label inclusion.
